commitment_reliability.interpretation: Delivery reliability is high (66/67 primary artifacts on disk; only IFC-257 partial). GOVERNANCE reliability is far lower (36/67 carry a clean canonical attestation among CSV-Completed rows; DOC-015 and DOC-016 add 2 more clean attestations that are stale at Backlog). The gap between delivery and governance is the sprint's core debt.
commitment_reliability.revision_note: delivered_in_fact corrected 65 -> 66 on 2026-07-22: DOC-016's CI-gate limb (.github/workflows/docs-integrity.yml) was found present on origin/main (blob 23a19fcf, commit f57490a91 / #598), so DOC-016 is fully delivered, not partial.

cycle_time.source_caveat: Cycle-time, duration, SPI and schedule-variance below derive from the GENERATED, GITIGNORED metrics cache (apps/project-tracker/docs/metrics/sprint-18/_summary.json, ADR-067 Phase 2). That cache is NOT committed and NOT reproducible in a clean checkout, so these are SUPPORTING context, not committed evidence. Committed timing evidence (task-tracking.json) is summarized under status_accuracy.completion_timestamp_evidence_committed.
cycle_time.reason: Recorded durations measure a single /exec session, not spec->done cycle time, and many completed tasks carry no committed completion timestamp at all (see status_accuracy). The generated cache additionally showed bulk-sync duplicate timestamp clusters, but those are not present in committed sources.

wip_aging.aging: Open across the whole sprint window; SESSION_CONTEXT (2026-07-19) records it "started 1mo ago". WIP age >= ~5 weeks — well beyond a 2-week cadence.

throughput.note: Delivery clustered heavily in June 2026 (34 of 49 feature commits) — burst rather than steady flow.

sprint_duration.source: apps/project-tracker/docs/metrics/sprint-18/_summary.json (schedule block); sprint_start/end dates are null in-source.

completion_timestamp_evidence_committed.correction_note: Replaces the prior 'synthetic_completion_timestamps: 28 (x16/x8 clusters)' claim, which was derived from the gitignored generated cache and is NOT reproducible from committed sources. Committed evidence shows NO cluster larger than x2; the real committed defect is timing ABSENCE (34 null + 5 missing files).

status_accuracy.synthetic_completion_timestamps: SUPERSEDED — see completion_timestamp_evidence_committed above. The prior integer 28 conflated 'tasks with a populated completed_at' with 'duplicated placeholders'; committed sources show 34 null + 28 populated with only 5 x2 pairs.
